subparts.text: Explain how tokenization works in NLP with an example.
Differentiate between phonology, morphology, syntax, and semantics. 5 Co1
Identify syntactic ambiguity in the sentence "He saw the girl with the telescope." What are the limitations of syntactic parsing in real-world applications? 5 Co3,4
List and explain the different types of ambiguity in NLP with examples 5 Co1,2
Explain how JSON and XML are used for storing and exchanging text data. What are their key differences? 5 Co1,2
Using BoW, represent the sentences: "NLP is great" "NLP is fun" Vocabulary: {NLP, is, great, fun} 5 Co3
Define a text corpus in NLP and list three different types of corpora used in text processing. 5 Co1
